access_attempts.result: PubMed abstract and metadata accessed via NCBI E-utilities.
access_attempts.notes: Extraction uses abstract-level results for this baseline pass.

name: Tadalafil for veterans with chronic obstructive pulmonary disease-pulmonary hypertension: A multicenter, placebo-controlled randomized trial.
summary: Multicenter placebo-controlled randomized trial in 42 older male veterans with COPD-associated pulmonary hypertension, comparing tadalafil 40 mg/day with placebo for 12 months; the primary endpoint was change in 6-minute walk distance at 12 months.
